creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building multimedia/gnome-mplayer ends fine.
	however, installing it to the stagedir fails.

Fix: 

I have no idea.
	Ignoring "GLIB_SCHEMAS=" lines in ports' Makefile can avoid this;
	who installs this schema files ?
How-To-Repeat: 	% portupgrade gnome-mplayer
